{{Expand}}

{{Infobox goldsign
| name = Yerin's Goldsign blades
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] uses [[Goldsign]] blades poised over her shoulders.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3">''Underlord'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] has [[sword]]-arms.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Goldsigns]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
